game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **MAGICUS**: Players engage in turn-based battles by matching 3 or more colored elemental runes on a grid, where each match deals damage to enemies and charges elemental magic meters. Matching specific colors triggers various effects, such as healing or status buffs, while accumulating enough of a single color allows players to tap an on-screen icon to unleash powerful magic spells. Progression involves clearing stages, which unlock new areas and grant rewards like gold and equipment, with difficulty scaling as enemies gain higher health, attack, and introduce new abilities. Players enhance their character by equipping weapons and armor with unique stats, changing jobs, allocating "gift" points to passive abilities, and dragging skill pieces onto a board to activate combined effects. Gold earned from battles can be used to purchase a home and furniture for various benefits, or to summon familiars to aid in combat, with defeat occurring if the player's HP reaches zero.
game_info.description: MAGICUS is a match-3 RPG where you battle enemies by matching colored runes on a grid. Match 3+ runes of the same color to attack enemies and charge elemental meters. Fill a meter completely to unlock devastating magic spells. Defeat enemies to earn gold, level up your character, and progress through increasingly challenging stages. Manage your HP carefully - if it reaches zero, the game is over!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move cursor on the rune grid
Space: Select/swap runes to create matches
Z: Cast charged spell (when meter is full)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic gameplay mechanics including cursor movement, rune selection, matching, and damage dealing. Validates that matches are detected correctly and enemy HP decreases appropriately.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move cursor randomly across the grid and attempt to swap runes. When valid matches occur, verify damage is dealt to enemies. Continue until either winning or losing to test full game loop.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully validates movement controls, rune swapping, match detection, and combat mechanics. Game should progress naturally through turns with proper phase transitions.

TEST_1.expected: The test successfully validates movement controls, rune swapping, match detection, and combat mechanics. Game should progress naturally through turns with proper phase transitions.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal winning strategy by prioritizing matches that charge spell meters and deal maximum damage. Focuses on defeating enemies efficiently while maintaining HP above zero.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Scan the grid for the best available matches (4+ matches preferred). Prioritize charging spell meters and use spells strategically when fully charged. Make moves that maximize damage output per turn.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state by defeating all enemies across multiple stages. The strategy should demonstrate efficient use of matches and spell casting to achieve victory.
